name: Glass Table Lamp (Set of 2) - 28 Inch Height - LIT4068 - Clear - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the Wendy 28 inch clear glass table lamp set of two. Designed to blend effortlessly with any decor, these lamps bring a touch of elegance and charm to your home. The clear glass material reflects light beautifully, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. Perfect for your living room, bedroom, or office, their versatile design fits seamlessly into any setting.

The Wendy lamp set offers a stylish and functional lighting solution. Each lamp stands tall at 28 inches, providing ample light without overwhelming your space. The clear design ensures that the lamps complement rather than compete with your existing decor. Whether you're reading your favorite book or simply enjoying a quiet evening at home, these lamps are an ideal choice for adding a touch of sophistication to any room. Discover the allure of clear glass and elevate your home with the Wendy table lamp set.
